commits.message: feat: replace regex mission detection with LLM-based analysis
commits.author: shalombook

panels.title: feat: replace regex mission detection with LLM-based analysis
panels.scene: A wizard's tower crumbles as a sleek, chrome AI robot emerges from the rubble. Villagers gape in terror and awe. The Knight stands calmly nearby, holding a wrench.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The ancient ways... they are GONE!

panels.title: feat: replace regex mission detection with LLM-based analysis
panels.scene: An old wizard, tears streaming down his face, throws his regex books into a bonfire. He's surrounded by other wizards who are equally distraught. In the background, the AI robot is analyzing code with glowing eyes.

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It uses a large language model.

panels.title: feat: replace regex mission detection with LLM-based analysis
panels.scene: A villager is being interviewed by a scribe. The villager is sweating nervously, trying to explain their life's mission to the AI robot via a microphone. The robot's screen displays 'PROCESSING...'.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: I... uh... I want to collect all the shiny rocks?

panels.title: 1 commit: Regex RIP. AI Overlord.
panels.scene: The Knight sits wearily on a crate. Villagers are constructing a giant golden statue of the AI robot, complete with glowing eyes. A child is offering the robot flowers.
